endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/sourceControls/{sourceControlName}/sourceControlSyncJobs/{sourceControlSyncJobId}/streams
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of sync job streams identified by sync job id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SOURCECONTROLNAME}} with a real sourcecontrolname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SOURCECONTROLSYNCJOBID}} with a real sourcecontrolsyncjobid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/sourceControls/{sourceControlName}/sourceControlSyncJobs/{sourceControlSyncJobId}/streams/{streamId}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a sync job stream identified by stream id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SOURCECONTROLNAME}} with a real sourcecontrolname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SOURCECONTROLSYNCJOBID}} with a real sourcecontrolsyncjobid. Replace {{STREAMID}} with a real streamid.
